title: Rename device - Rename, non English language
scenario: Verify that renaming a device with non-English characters across multiple supported languages correctly updates and displays the new name on all relevant screens.
steps: 1. Start the app with a non-English language selected.
3. Click the device's official name to trigger the 'Rename your Device' popup.
4. Enter non-English characters (e.g., Chinese, Arabic, Cyrillic, etc.) as the new device name.
6. Verify the new name displays correctly on the Device Settings page.
7. Verify the new name displays correctly on the Home Screen.
8. Verify the new name displays correctly on the Find My Device screen.
9. Verify the new name displays correctly on the Support > Device page.
expected: The device name with non-English characters is displayed correctly on the Device Settings page, Home Screen, Find My Device screen, and Support > Device page.
